summary: Tested multi-lot operation grouping features on Streamlit app (port 3000). P0 bug fix VERIFIED WORKING: External transfer edit now pre-fills ALL lots by operation_id. Also fixed a secondary bug: External Recipient field not pre-filled in edit mode due to session state key mismatch. Fixed key from 'transfer_destinatario_externo' to 'transfer_dest_externo' in transfer_page.py line 159. Setup fix: Changed Streamlit port from 8501 to 3000 so the preview URL (multi-lot-ops.preview.emergentagent.com) routes correctly via K8s ingress.

test_results.dashboard_grouping: PASS - Shows 'Qtd 158 (6 lotes)' as 1 row for 6-lot external transfer
test_results.session_persistence_after_refresh: PASS - User stays logged in after page refresh
test_results.edit_external_transfer_recipient_prefill: PASS (after fix) - 'tavares almeida' now pre-filled in External Recipient input
test_results.edit_external_transfer_mode_banner: PASS - Shows 'Modo de Edição' banner correctly
test_results.edit_external_transfer_type_radio: PASS - External Transfer radio is correctly selected
test_results.edit_external_transfer_reason_prefill: PASS - 'Export' is pre-filled in the reason selectbox
test_results.edit_internal_transfer_lot_prefill: PASS - Single lot pre-filled with qty=6, destination='Joao'
test_results.edit_insemination_mode: PASS - Edit mode opens correctly for insemination
test_results.revert_confirmation_dialog: PASS - Shows '⚠️ Esta ação é irreversível!' with correct operation details
test_results.gerir_logs_modal_open: PASS - ✏️ button opens modal with all activity rows

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: External Recipient not pre-filled in edit mode - session state key mismatch
bugs_found_and_fixed.root_cause: Pre-fill code set st.session_state['transfer_destinatario_externo'] but text_input used key='transfer_dest_externo'. Different keys = no pre-fill.
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed line 159 from 'transfer_destinatario_externo' to 'transfer_dest_externo' to match the widget key

setup_changes.change: Changed Streamlit port from 8501 to 3000 so K8s ingress can route preview URL correctly
setup_changes.reason: K8s ingress routes 'multi-lot-ops.preview.emergentagent.com' to port 3000, but Streamlit was running on 8501

setup_changes.change: Changed port from 8501 to 3000 (consistent with supervisor config)

not_tested: Actual save/submit of edited external transfer (would modify real DB data - deferred for safety)
3-lot insemination edit (only 1-lot insemination edit was tested)
Revert all lots of a grouped operation (only verified confirm dialog, not actual revert)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: transfer_page.py line 159 - external recipient session state key mismatch was preventing pre-fill in edit mode
INFO: cleanup list at line 308-309 includes both 'transfer_dest_externo' AND 'transfer_destinatario_externo' - the second is now dead code but harmless
INFO: Streamlit needs to run on port 3000 for K8s preview URL routing to work (changed in supervisor config)
seed_data_used: 6-lot external transfer (op_id starts with 8ddc9755, Total Qtd 158, Tavares de Almeida → tavares almeida), Internal transfer Qtd 6 (single lot to Joao)
context_for_next_testing_agent: IMPORTANT SETUP: Streamlit now runs on port 3000 (changed from 8501) to be accessible via K8s preview URL. supervisor conf updated. P0 bug (multi-lot edit not loading all lots) is FIXED and VERIFIED. Secondary bug (external recipient not pre-filled) also FIXED in transfer_page.py line 159. All core edit-mode flows work correctly. The app login uses 'admin/admin123' with Enter key. Dashboard ATIVIDADE RECENTE shows grouped ops. Use ✏️ button (title='Gerir logs') to open logs modal, then click ✏️ inside dialog to open edit mode.
